        async function pruneHistoryFrom(identifier) {
            // Identifier can be ID (int) or timestamp (long int)
            const type = elements.inputForm.dataset.editingType || 'timestamp';
            const value = parseInt(identifier);
            if (!value) return;

            let targetMsg;
            if (type === 'id') {
                targetMsg = Array.from(elements.messagesContainer.children).find(m => m.getAttribute('data-id') == value);
            } else {
                targetMsg = Array.from(elements.messagesContainer.children).find(m => m.getAttribute('data-timestamp') == value);
            }

            // 1. UI Pruning
            if (targetMsg) {
                let current = targetMsg;
                while (current) {
                    const next = current.nextElementSibling;
                    current.remove();
                    current = next;
                }
            }

            // 2. Backend Pruning
            if (currentSessionId && type === 'id') {
                console.log(`🧹 Pruning backend history (ID):`, currentSessionId, value);
                try {
                    const payload = {
                        sessionId: currentSessionId,
                        id: value
                    };

                    await fetch(PRUNE_URL, {
                        method: 'POST',
                        body: JSON.stringify(payload),
                        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
                    });
                } catch (e) { console.error('Prune error:', e); }
            } else if (type !== 'id') {
                console.warn('⚠️ Cannot prune backend history without Message ID (Optimistic message). Reload to sync IDs.');
            }
        }

        // ======= HELPER: wrap inner campaign sub-sections in styled boxes =======
        function componentizeCampaignBody(cBody) {
            let out = cBody;
            // Terminator: next sub-section emoji (handles * ** bullet prefix), HTML blocks, or end
            var subEnd = '(?=\\n\\s*(?:\\*\\s+)?\\*{0,2}\\s*(?:💡|🔍|🛠️)|\\n<div[\\s>]|\\n<details[\\s>]|$)';

            // 💡 Análise Tática → tactic-box  (handles: * **💡 Title (Extra):** , ## 💡 Title:, 💡 Title)
            out = out.replace(new RegExp('(?:^|\\n)\\s*(?:\\*\\s+)?\\*{0,2}\\s*(?:#{1,3}\\s*)?💡[^\\n]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)' + subEnd, 'gi'), function(m, body) {
                return '\n\n<div class="tactic-box"><div class="tactic-box-header">💡 Análise Tática</div>\n\n' + body.trim() + '\n\n</div>\n\n';
            });

            // 🔍 Auditoria do Link → audit-box
            out = out.replace(new RegExp('(?:^|\\n)\\s*(?:\\*\\s+)?\\*{0,2}\\s*(?:#{1,3}\\s*)?🔍[^\\n]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)' + subEnd, 'gi'), function(m, body) {
                return '\n\n<div class="audit-box"><div class="audit-box-header">🔍 Auditoria do Link</div>\n\n' + body.trim() + '\n\n</div>\n\n';
            });

            // 🛠️ Ação Corretiva → action-box
            out = out.replace(new RegExp('(?:^|\\n)\\s*(?:\\*\\s+)?\\*{0,2}\\s*(?:#{1,3}\\s*)?🛠️[^\\n]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)' + subEnd, 'gi'), function(m, body) {
                var enhanced = body.trim();
                enhanced = enhanced.replace(/\[URGENTE\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge urgente">URGENTE</span>');
                enhanced = enhanced.replace(/\[ALTA\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge alta">ALTA</span>');
                enhanced = enhanced.replace(/\[M[EÉ]DIA\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge media">MÉDIA</span>');
                enhanced = enhanced.replace(/\[BAIXA\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge baixa">BAIXA</span>');
                enhanced = enhanced.replace(/\[TESTE\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge teste">TESTE</span>');
                return '\n\n<div class="action-box"><div class="action-box-header">🛠️ Ação Corretiva</div>\n\n' + enhanced + '\n\n</div>\n\n';
            });

            return out;
        }

        // ======= HELPER: wrap product-level sections in styled boxes =======
        // Runs AFTER campaigns are already extracted (replaced with <div class="campaign-card">)
        function componentizeProductSections(innerBody) {
            let out = innerBody;
            // Terminator: next section emoji (with/without # prefix), HTML blocks, or end
            var secEnd = '(?=\\n\\s*(?:#{1,3}\\s+|\\*{0,2}\\s*(?:📋|🎯|🔑|⚔️|📚|📢))|\\n<div[\\s>]|\\n<span[\\s>]|\\n<details[\\s>]|$)';

            // 📋 Visão Executiva → section-box vision (handles with/without # prefix)
            out = out.replace(new RegExp('(?:^|\\n)\\s*(?:#{1,3}\\s*)?\\*{0,2}\\s*📋[^\\n]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)' + secEnd, 'gi'), function(m, body) {
                return '\n\n<div class="section-box vision"><div class="section-box-header"><span class="section-icon">📋</span> Visão Executiva</div>\n\n' + body.trim() + '\n\n</div>\n\n';
            });

            // 🎯 ESTRATÉGIA → section-box strategy
            out = out.replace(new RegExp('(?:^|\\n)\\s*(?:#{1,3}\\s*)?\\*{0,2}\\s*🎯[^\\n]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)' + secEnd, 'gi'), function(m, body) {
                return '\n\n<div class="section-box strategy"><div class="section-box-header"><span class="section-icon">🎯</span> Estratégia</div>\n\n' + body.trim() + '\n\n</div>\n\n';
            });

            // 🔑 INTELIGÊNCIA GLOBAL → section-box keywords
            out = out.replace(new RegExp('(?:^|\\n)\\s*(?:#{1,3}\\s*)?\\*{0,2}\\s*🔑[^\\n]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)' + secEnd, 'gi'), function(m, body) {
                return '\n\n<div class="section-box keywords"><div class="section-box-header"><span class="section-icon">🔑</span> Inteligência Global de Palavras-chave</div>\n\n' + body.trim() + '\n\n</div>\n\n';
            });

            // Cálculo consolidado → collapsible calc block
            out = out.replace(new RegExp('(?:^|\\n)\\s*(?:#{1,3}\\s*)?\\*{0,2}\\s*(?:Cálculo consolidado|Calculo consolidado)[^\\n]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)' + secEnd, 'gi'), function(m, body) {
                return '\n\n<details class="calc-collapsible"><summary>📐 Cálculo Consolidado</summary><div class="calc-body">\n\n' + body.trim() + '\n\n</div></details>\n\n';
            });

            return out;
        }

        // ======= Parse assistant content into componentized HTML =======
        // KEY DESIGN: marked.parse() is called on inner content pieces BEFORE
        // wrapping in <details>/<summary>, so marked never breaks the accordion structure.
        function parseAssistantHTML(rawText) {
            let parsedContent = rawText || '';

            // Clean visual separators early (before any regex processing)
            parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(/\n={3,}\n/g, '\n\n');
            parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(/\n-{3,}\n/g, '\n\n');
            parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(/--+\s*ANALISANDO\s+CAMPANHAS[^\n]*--*/gi, '');

            // Strip markdown heading prefixes from product/pending lines so regexes match
            parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(/^(#{1,3})\s+(📦\s)/gm, '$2');
            parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(/^(#{1,3})\s+(⏳\s)/gm, '$2');

            if (parsedContent.includes('📦') && parsedContent.includes('PRODUTO:')) {
                
                // Extract intro text BEFORE the first 📦 PRODUTO block
                const firstProductIdx = parsedContent.search(/📦\s*(?:\*\*|)\s*PRODUTO:/);
                let introHtml = '';
                if (firstProductIdx > 0) {
                    let introText = parsedContent.substring(0, firstProductIdx).trim();
                    parsedContent = parsedContent.substring(firstProductIdx);
                    if (introText.length > 10) {
                        introHtml = '<div class="intro-box">' + marked.parse(introText) + '</div>';
                    }
                }

                // Extract PENDING INDEXES section at the end
                let pendingHtml = '';
                const pendingMatch = parsedContent.match(/\n(#{1,3}\s*)?⏳\s*(?:\*\*)?(?:INDEXES? PENDENTES?|Indexes? Pendentes?)[^\n]*\n([\s\S]*)$/i);
                if (pendingMatch) {
                    const pendingAll = pendingMatch[0];
                    parsedContent = parsedContent.substring(0, parsedContent.length - pendingAll.length);
                    const pendingBody = pendingAll.replace(/^[\s\n]*(#{1,3}\s*)?⏳\s*(?:\*\*)?(?:INDEXES? PENDENTES?|Indexes? Pendentes?)[^\n]*\n?/i, '').trim();
                    pendingHtml = '<div class="pending-cta"><div class="pending-cta-header"><span class="pending-icon">⏳</span> Indexes Pendentes de Análise</div>' + marked.parse(pendingBody) + '</div>';
                }

                // Process product blocks — collect HTML into array
                const productRegex = /(?:^|\n)(📦\s*(?:\*\*|)\s*PRODUTO:[^\n]+)([\s\S]*?)(?=\n📦\s*(?:\*\*|)\s*PRODUTO:|\n(?:#{1,3}\s*)?⏳\s*(?:\*\*|)\s*INDEXES? PENDENTES?|$)/gi;
                
                let productIndex = 0;
                const totalProducts = (parsedContent.match(/📦\s*(?:\*\*|)\s*PRODUTO:/gi) || []).length;
                const productHtmlBlocks = [];
                
                // Use exec loop to process each product
                let pMatch;
                while ((pMatch = productRegex.exec(parsedContent)) !== null) {
                    productIndex++;
                    const titleLine = pMatch[1];
                    const body = pMatch[2];
                    const title = titleLine.replace(/\*\*/g, '').trim(); 
                    let innerBody = body.trim();

                    // Health score
                    innerBody = innerBody.replace(/🏥\s*(?:\*\*)?Saúde do Produto(?:\*\*)?\s*[:：]\s*([\d.,]+)\s*\/\s*10\s*[-–]?\s*([^\n]*)/gi, function(m, score, desc) {
                        const numScore = parseFloat(score.replace(',','.'));
                        const tier = numScore >= 7 ? 'high' : numScore >= 4 ? 'medium' : 'low';
                        return `\n\n<div class="product-health"><div class="health-score-circle score-${tier}">${score}</div><div class="health-info"><div class="health-label">Saúde do Produto</div><div class="health-desc">${desc.trim() || (tier === 'high' ? 'Linha saudável' : tier === 'medium' ? 'Atenção necessária' : 'Linha crítica')}</div></div></div>\n\n`;
                    });

                    // Consolidated KPIs
                    innerBody = innerBody.replace(/📊\s*(?:\*\*)?Consolidado(?:\s*da\s*Linha)?(?:\*\*)?\s*[:：]\s*([^\n]+)/gi, function(m, kpis) {
                        const parts = kpis.split('|').map(p => p.trim());
                        let html = '<div class="product-summary-grid">';
                        parts.forEach(p => {
                            const [label, ...rest] = p.split(':');
                            const val = rest.join(':').trim();
                            if (label && val) {
                                html += `<div class="summary-card"><div class="summary-value">${val}</div><div class="summary-label">${label.trim()}</div></div>`;
                            }
                        });
                        html += '</div>';
                        return '\n\n' + html + '\n\n';
                    });

                    // RAG sources
                    innerBody = innerBody.replace(/📚\s*(?:\*\*)?Fonte(?:s)?\s*RAG(?:\*\*)?\s*[:：]\s*([^\n]+)/gi, function(m, sources) {
                        const srcs = sources.split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
                        return '\n\n' + srcs.map(s => `<span class="rag-source">📚 ${s}</span>`).join(' ') + '\n\n';
                    });

                    // Cannibalization warnings (multi-line: captures paragraph until blank-line break)
                    innerBody = innerBody.replace(/⚔️\s*(?:\*\*)?Canibalização(?:\*\*)?\s*[:：]\s*([^\n]+(?:\n(?!\n)[^\n]*)*)/gi, function(m, text) {
                        return `\n\n<div class="cannibalization-warning"><strong>⚔️ Atenção:</strong> ${text.trim()}</div>\n\n`;
                    });

                    // *** CAMPAIGNS FIRST — extract before section componentization ***
                    if (innerBody.includes('📢') && innerBody.includes('CAMPANHA:')) {
                        const campRegex = /(?:^|\n)(📢\s*(?:\*\*|)\s*CAMPANHA:[^\n]+)([\s\S]*?)(?=\n📢\s*(?:\*\*|)\s*CAMPANHA:|\n\s*(?:#{1,3}\s*)?(?:📋|🎯|🔑)|$)/gi;
                        let campRank = 0;
                        innerBody = innerBody.replace(campRegex, function(cMatch, cTitleLine, cBody) {
                            campRank++;
                            const cleanTitle = cTitleLine.replace(/\*\*/g, '').trim();
                            
                            let statusClass = '';
                            const statusContext = cleanTitle + ' ' + cBody.substring(0, 500);
                            if (statusContext.includes('🚀') || /escalável|escalavel/i.test(statusContext)) statusClass = 'escalavel';
                            else if (/⏳|maturação|maturacao/i.test(statusContext)) statusClass = 'maturacao';
                            else if (/⚠️|gargalo/i.test(statusContext)) statusClass = 'gargalo';
                            else if (/🛑|ralo/i.test(statusContext)) statusClass = 'ralo';

                            const rankClass = campRank <= 3 ? ` rank-${campRank}` : '';
                            const statusLabel = statusClass === 'escalavel' ? '🚀 Escalável' : statusClass === 'maturacao' ? '⏳ Maturação' : statusClass === 'gargalo' ? '⚠️ Gargalo' : statusClass === 'ralo' ? '🛑 Ralo' : '';

                            let campBody = componentizeCampaignBody(cBody.trim());
                            campBody = campBody.replace(/\[URGENTE\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge urgente">URGENTE</span>');
                            campBody = campBody.replace(/\[ALTA\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge alta">ALTA</span>');
                            campBody = campBody.replace(/\[M[EÉ]DIA\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge media">MÉDIA</span>');
                            campBody = campBody.replace(/\[BAIXA\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge baixa">BAIXA</span>');
                            campBody = campBody.replace(/\[TESTE\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge teste">TESTE</span>');

                            return `\n\n<div class="campaign-card" data-status="${statusClass}">\n<h4><span class="rank-badge${rankClass}">${campRank}</span> ${cleanTitle} ${statusLabel ? `<span class="status-badge ${statusClass}">${statusLabel}</span>` : ''}</h4>\n\n${campBody}\n\n</div>\n\n`;
                        });
                    }

                    // *** THEN product-level sections (now safe — campaigns already replaced with <div>) ***
                    innerBody = componentizeProductSections(innerBody);

                    // Apply priority tags to any remaining text in innerBody
                    innerBody = innerBody.replace(/\[URGENTE\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge urgente">URGENTE</span>');
                    innerBody = innerBody.replace(/\[ALTA\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge alta">ALTA</span>');
                    innerBody = innerBody.replace(/\[M[EÉ]DIA\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge media">MÉDIA</span>');
                    innerBody = innerBody.replace(/\[BAIXA\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge baixa">BAIXA</span>');
                    innerBody = innerBody.replace(/\[TESTE\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge teste">TESTE</span>');

                    // Parse inner content with marked BEFORE wrapping in <details>
                    // This ensures marked.parse() never sees <details>/<summary> tags
                    const innerHtml = marked.parse(innerBody);

                    const isOpen = productIndex === 1 ? ' open' : '';
                    productHtmlBlocks.push(
                        '<details class="campaign-accordion product-block" data-product="' + productIndex + '"' + isOpen + '>' +
                        '<summary><span class="product-number">' + productIndex + '/' + totalProducts + '</span> ' + title + '</summary>' +
                        '<div class="product-body">' + innerHtml + '</div>' +
                        '</details>'
                    );
                }
                
                // Build expand/collapse all toggle if multiple products
                let toggleHtml = '';
                if (totalProducts > 1) {
                    toggleHtml = '<div class="products-toggle-bar"><span class="products-count">' + totalProducts + ' produtos analisados</span><button class="toggle-all-btn" onclick="(function(btn){var blocks=btn.closest(\'.message-content\').querySelectorAll(\'.product-block\');var anyOpen=Array.from(blocks).some(function(b){return b.open});blocks.forEach(function(b){b.open=!anyOpen});btn.textContent=anyOpen?\'Expandir todos\':\'Recolher todos\'})(this)">Recolher todos</button></div>';
                }
                
                // Concatenate final HTML — <details> tags are pure HTML, never passed through marked
                return introHtml + toggleHtml + productHtmlBlocks.join('') + pendingHtml;
            }
            
            // Non-product content: priority tags then marked
            parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(/\[URGENTE\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge urgente">URGENTE</span>');
            parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(/\[ALTA\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge alta">ALTA</span>');
            parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(/\[M[EÉ]DIA\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge media">MÉDIA</span>');
            parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(/\[BAIXA\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge baixa">BAIXA</span>');
            parsedContent = parsedContent.replace(/\[TESTE\]/gi, '<span class="priority-badge teste">TESTE</span>');

            return marked.parse(parsedContent);
        }

        function renderMessage(message) {
            hideEmptyState(); // Ensure empty state is gone
            console.log('🖼️ Rendering message:', message);
            const messageDiv = document.createElement('div');
            messageDiv.className = `message ${message.role}`;
            if (message.id) messageDiv.setAttribute('data-id', message.id);

            // Store timestamp for Edit logic (default to now if missing)
            const timestamp = message.timestamp ? new Date(message.timestamp).getTime() : Date.now();
            messageDiv.setAttribute('data-timestamp', timestamp);

            const avatarDiv = document.createElement('div');
            avatarDiv.className = 'message-avatar';

            if (message.role === 'user') {
                avatarDiv.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="user"></i>';
            } else {
                avatarDiv.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="bot"></i>';
            }

            const content = document.createElement('div');
            content.className = 'message-content';

            // Renderizar conteúdo
            let editBtn = null;

            if (message.role === 'assistant') {
                content.innerHTML = parseAssistantHTML(message.content);

                // Force new tab for links
                content.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => {
                    link.setAttribute('target', '_blank');
                    link.setAttribute('rel', 'noopener noreferrer');
                });
            } else {
                // Se for arquivo, NÃO mostra texto nem botão de editar
                if (message.file) {
                    // Conteúdo de texto oculto para arquivos, mostra só o pill abaixo
                } else {
                    content.textContent = message.content || '';

                    // ADD EDIT BUTTON FOR USER (Always allow edit)
                    editBtn = document.createElement('button');
                    editBtn.className = 'btn-edit';
                    editBtn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="pencil" style="width: 14px; height: 14px;"></i>';
                    editBtn.onclick = () => {
                        startEdit(messageDiv, message.content);
                    };
                }
            }

            // Add file attachment if present
            if (message.file) {
                const fileDiv = document.createElement('div');
                fileDiv.className = 'file-attachment';
                fileDiv.innerHTML = `<i data-lucide="file"></i><span>${message.file}</span>`;
                content.appendChild(fileDiv);
            }

            if (message.role === 'assistant') { // Avatar first for assistant
                messageDiv.appendChild(avatarDiv);
                messageDiv.appendChild(content);
            } else { // User: Avatar last (handled by flex-row-reverse), content first
                // Fix for flex-row-reverse: 
                // 1. Avatar (Visually Right) -> Append First
                // 2. Content (Visually Center) -> Append Second
                // 3. EditBtn (Visually Left) -> Append Last
                messageDiv.appendChild(avatarDiv);
                messageDiv.appendChild(content);
                if (editBtn) {
                    messageDiv.appendChild(editBtn);
                }
            }

            elements.messagesContainer.appendChild(messageDiv);
            elements.messagesContainer.scrollTop = elements.messagesContainer.scrollHeight;
            lucide.createIcons();

            return messageDiv;
        }

            if (pendingAction === 'delete' && sessionToDeleteId) {

                try {
                    const success = await deleteSession(sessionToDeleteId);
                    if (success) {
                        // 1. Refresh list from server (removes deleted, updates order)
                        sessions = await fetchSessions();

                        // 2. Check if we deleted the current session
                        if (currentSessionId === sessionToDeleteId) {
                            if (sessions.length > 0) {
                                // Switch to the most recent (first) session
                                renderSessionList(); // Update list first
                                loadSession(sessions[0].session_id);
                            } else {
                                // No sessions left -> Start New Chat
                                startNewChat();
                            }
                        } else {
                            // We deleted a background session -> Just update list
                            renderSessionList();
                        }
                    } else {
                        setStatus('Erro ao excluir conversa.', 'error');
                    }
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error('Delete handler error:', e);
                    setStatus('Erro inesperado ao excluir.', 'error');
                } finally {

        async function loadSession(sessionId) {
            console.log('📂 Loading session:', sessionId);

            // Clean up any temporary/empty sessions from list when switching
            if (currentSessionId !== sessionId) {
                sessions = sessions.filter(s => !s._isTemp);
                renderSessionList();
            }

            currentSessionId = sessionId;
            clearChatArea();
            showSkeletonMessages();
            const history = await fetchHistory(sessionId);
            clearChatArea(); // Shows empty state by default

            if (history && history.length > 0) {
                hideEmptyState(); // Hide if we have content
                history.forEach(message => renderMessage(message));
            } else {
                showEmptyState(); // Explicit show if empty
            }

            renderSessionList();
            elements.messageInput.focus();
        }
        function startNewChat() {
            console.log('➕ Starting new chat');

            // Avoid creating multiple temp sessions
            sessions = sessions.filter(s => !s._isTemp);

            currentSessionId = generateUUID();
            clearChatArea();

            // Add temporary "Nova conversa" to session list
            const tempSession = {
                session_id: currentSessionId,
                titulo: 'Nova conversa',
                data_inicio: new Date().toISOString(),
                _isTemp: true // Helper flag
            };
            sessions.unshift(tempSession);

            renderSessionList();
            elements.messageInput.focus();
            setStatus('Nova conversa iniciada', 'success');
        }
        async function handleSendMessage(e) {
            e.preventDefault();

            // CHECK FOR STOP ACTION
            if (isLoading) {
                // 1. Cancelar Geração de Texto
                if (abortController) {
                    abortController.abort();
                    abortController = null;
                    setStatus('Geração interrompida.', 'warning');
                    hideTypingIndicator();
                    setLoading(false);
                }
                // 2. Cancelar Upload
                if (uploadAbortController) {
                    uploadAbortController.abort();
                    uploadAbortController = null;
                    setStatus('Upload cancelado.', 'warning');
                    hideTypingIndicator();
                    setLoading(false);
                }
                return;
            }

            const message = elements.messageInput.value.trim();
            if (!message) return;

            // CHECK FOR EDIT ACTION
            if (isEditing) {
                const editingId = elements.inputForm.dataset.editingId;
                if (editingId) {
                    console.log('✏️ Submitting Edit. Pruning from:', editingId);
                    pruneHistoryFrom(editingId);
                    // Clear edit state for next message
                    cancelEdit();
                }
            }

            renderMessage({ role: 'user', content: message });
            elements.messageInput.value = '';
            elements.messageInput.style.height = 'auto';

            // Start loading (Change icon to Stop)
            setLoading(true);

            showTypingIndicator();
            
            let messageDiv = null;
            let contentDiv = null;

            const response = await sendMessage(message, currentSessionId, (chunkText) => {
                if ((!chunkText || chunkText.trim() === '') && !messageDiv) return;
                
                if (!messageDiv) {
                    hideTypingIndicator();
                    messageDiv = renderMessage({ role: 'assistant', content: '' });
                    contentDiv = messageDiv.querySelector('.message-content');
                }
                if (contentDiv) {
                    // Update content actively via chunks
                    contentDiv.innerHTML = marked.parse(chunkText);
                    
                    // Force new tab for links dynamically created in streams
                    contentDiv.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => {
                        link.setAttribute('target', '_blank');
                        link.setAttribute('rel', 'noopener noreferrer');
                    });
                    
                    elements.messagesContainer.scrollTop = elements.messagesContainer.scrollHeight;
                }
            });

            if (!messageDiv) hideTypingIndicator();

            // Should only render if NOT aborted OR complete final render
            if (response !== 'Geração cancelada.') {
                if (!messageDiv) {
                    renderMessage({ role: 'assistant', content: response });
                } else if (contentDiv) {
                    // Final refresh with full componentized parsing
                    contentDiv.innerHTML = parseAssistantHTML(response);
                    contentDiv.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => {
                        link.setAttribute('target', '_blank');
                        link.setAttribute('rel', 'noopener noreferrer');
                    });
                }
            } else if (messageDiv) {
                // If cancelled while streaming, append feedback
                contentDiv.innerHTML += marked.parse("\n\n*Geração cancelada pelo usuário.*");
            }

            setLoading(false);

            // SYNC IDS FOR OPTIMISTIC MESSAGES
            // Fetch history to get Real IDs for the messages we just rendered optimistically
            try {
                const latestHistory = await fetchHistory(currentSessionId);
                if (latestHistory && latestHistory.length > 0) {
                    // We only need to sync the last few messages
                    // Strategy: Iterate backwards through DOM and History to match
                    const domMessages = Array.from(elements.messagesContainer.querySelectorAll('.message'));

                    // Get last 2 user messages and last 2 assistant messages from DOM to be safe
                    // (Usually just need the very last one of each)
                    const lastDomMsg = domMessages[domMessages.length - 1];

                    if (lastDomMsg) {
                        // Find matching message in history based on content or role/time
                        // Simple approach: Match the very last message of history to last ID-less DOM message
                        const lastHistoryMsg = latestHistory[latestHistory.length - 1];

                        if (lastHistoryMsg && !lastDomMsg.hasAttribute('data-id')) {
                            lastDomMsg.setAttribute('data-id', lastHistoryMsg.id);
                            console.log('🔄 Synced ID for last message:', lastHistoryMsg.id);
                        }

                        // Also check the user message before it (if it was optimistic)
                        if (domMessages.length >= 2) {
                            const userDomMsg = domMessages[domMessages.length - 2];
                            const userHistoryMsg = latestHistory[latestHistory.length - 2];

                            if (userDomMsg && !userDomMsg.hasAttribute('data-id') && userHistoryMsg) {
                                userDomMsg.setAttribute('data-id', userHistoryMsg.id);
                                console.log('🔄 Synced ID for user message:', userHistoryMsg.id);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.warn('Failed to sync message IDs:', e);
            }

            sessions = await fetchSessions();
            renderSessionList();
        }
        // Attach - IMPLEMENTED FILE UPLOAD
        elements.attachBtn.addEventListener('click', () => elements.fileInput.click());
        elements.fileInput.addEventListener('change', async (e) => {
            const file = e.target.files[0];
            if (!file) return;

            // 1. Mostrar mensagem do usuário imediatamente (SÓ O PILL, SEM TEXTO VISIVEL)
            renderMessage({
                role: 'user',
                content: `Enviando arquivo: ${file.name}`, // Mantém texto para histórico, mas UI oculta
                file: file.name
            });

            console.log('📤 Uploading file:', file.name, 'Session:', currentSessionId);
            setStatus(`Processando ${file.name}...`, 'warning'); // Amarelo/Laranja enquanto processa
            isLoading = true;

            // Abort Controller para Upload
            uploadAbortController = new AbortController();

            showTypingIndicator();
            setLoading(true); // Ativa botão de stop

            try {
                const formData = new FormData();
                formData.append('file', file);

                if (currentSessionId) {
                    formData.append('session_id', currentSessionId);
                    formData.append('sessionId', currentSessionId);
                }

                const uploadUrlWithParam = currentSessionId
                    ? `${UPLOAD_URL}?sessionId=${currentSessionId}`
                    : UPLOAD_URL;

                const response = await fetch(uploadUrlWithParam, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    body: formData,
                    signal: uploadAbortController.signal
                });

                if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Upload failed');

                const text = await response.text();
                let result = {};
                try {
                    if (text && text.trim().length > 0) result = JSON.parse(text);
                } catch (e) { }

                hideTypingIndicator();

                // 2. SUCESSO: Mensagem verde
                setStatus(`${file.name} processado com sucesso!`, 'success');

                // 3. CONFIRMAÇÃO LOCAL (Sem disparar agente)
                // O arquivo já foi processado pelo RAG, apenas confirmamos visualmente.
                renderMessage({
                    role: 'assistant',
                    content: `✅ **Arquivo Recebido**\n\nO documento "${file.name}" foi processado. Você pode fazer perguntas sobre ele agora.`
                });

                // OPCIONAL: Se o backend de upload não salvar histórico, o reload perderá essa mensagem.
                // Mas o usuário pediu explicitamente para não mandar msg pro agente.

            } catch (error) {
                if (error.name === 'AbortError') {
                    console.log('⏹️ Upload cancelado pelo usuário');
                    // Não precisa fazer nada, o handler do botão stop já limpou UI
                } else {
                    console.error('Upload error:', error);
                    hideTypingIndicator();
                    setStatus(`Erro ao processar ${file.name}`, 'error');

                    renderMessage({
                        role: 'assistant',
                        content: `❌ **Falha no envio**\n\nNão foi possível processar o arquivo "${file.name}". Tente novamente.`
                    });
                }
            } finally {
                isLoading = false;
                uploadAbortController = null;
                setLoading(false); // Restaura botão send
                e.target.value = '';
            }
        });
        // Handle Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
        elements.messageInput.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {
            if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
                e.preventDefault();
                handleSendMessage(e);
            }
        });

        // Auto-resize textarea
        elements.messageInput.addEventListener('input', function () {
            this.style.height = 'auto';
            this.style.height = (this.scrollHeight) + 'px';
        });
        // ============================================
        // INITIALIZATION
        // ============================================
        // Renamed from init -> startApp to imply it starts the heavy lifting
        // let appStarted = false; // Moved to top
        async function startApp() {
            if (appStarted) return; // Prevent double run
            appStarted = true;

            checkHealth();

        window.addEventListener('resize', checkMobileAndSetSidebar);

        // Global Initialization
